message:
fix: address security, reliability, and correctness issues from deep audit

Security:
- Exclude credentials/secrets from rsync transfers (.cargo/credentials,
  .env, *.pem, *.key, credentials.json, secrets.*)

Reliability:
- Fix TOCTOU race in check_drain_complete: use single write lock instead
  of read-then-write to prevent concurrent status corruption
- Abort background tasks (metrics, cleanup) on daemon shutdown instead
  of leaking them
- Cap API limit/offset parameters (10K/1M) to prevent memory exhaustion
  from untrusted input

Correctness:
- Fix zero-slots edge case in balanced worker selection: return score 0
  instead of silently converting 0→1 via .max(1)
- Clamp speed_score to [0.0, 1.0] to guard against NaN/overflow
- Fix TUI sort cycle: TimeAsc/DurationAsc now rejoin the main cycle
  instead of being trapped in a disconnected 2-state loop

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1966,6 +1966,15 @@ fn default_excludes() -> Vec<String> {
         // Coverage reports (generated during tests)
         "coverage/".to_string(),
         ".nyc_output/".to_string(),
+        // Credentials and secrets (must never be transferred to workers)
+        ".cargo/credentials".to_string(),
+        ".cargo/credentials.toml".to_string(),
+        ".env".to_string(),
+        ".env.*".to_string(),
+        "*.pem".to_string(),
+        "*.key".to_string(),
+        "credentials.json".to_string(),
+        "secrets.*".to_string(),
     ]
 }
